word: G1927 - ἐπιδημέω - epidēméō - ep-ee-day-meh'-o - Dwelling there

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to be present among one's people

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G1909 and G1218; to make oneself at home, that is, (by extension) to reside (in a foreign country): - [be] dwelling (which were) there, stranger.
